strategy: Enter on Round 1. Joining late eats a 500-damage Star Mana Burn that pierces all resist.
Hit with Myth (+30%); she resists Storm most (51%).
She summons a Clockworker on Round 1. Plan an AoE finish to catch it, or kill it before your burst.
Burst before Round 4. At the start of every 4th Round she steals all Charms and all Wards from every Wizard. Stack and hit within a 3-round window.
Skip Feint on Lucia; it makes her Cleanse Ward all harmful wards off herself. Build with blades and non-Feint setup, then hit.
cheatNotes: Joining after Round 1 draws a Star Mana Burn that pierces all resist for 500. Be in from the start.
She summons a Clockworker on Round 1 (more with 3+ Wizards). Plan to AoE or clear it.
At the start of every 4th Round she steals every Charm and every Ward from all Wizards. Land your hit inside the 3-round window.
Casting Feint on her makes her Cleanse Ward it right off herself. Use other setup instead.
